title: Opening for Software Engineer at iCliniq

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at iCliniq
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq:
iCliniq is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq!
